@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+{"tag": "checkpoint-20250926-154259", "file": "/workspaces/claude-code-flow/package.json", "timestamp": "2025-09-26T15:42:59Z", "type": "post-edit", "branch": "alpha-125", "diff_summary": " .claude-flow/metrics/performance.json    |  2 +-  .claude-flow/metrics/system-metrics.json | 24 ++++++++++++++++++++++++  .claude-flow/metrics/task-metrics.json   |  6 +++---  .claude/checkpoints/task-1758901317.json |  1 +  claude-flow-wiki                         |  0  package.json                             |  2 +-  6 files changed, 30 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-) "}

@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
     "build:esm": "swc src -d dist --config-file .swcrc --ignore 'src/ui/extension/node_modules/**/*'",
     "build:cjs": "swc src -d dist-cjs --config-file .swcrc --ignore 'src/ui/extension/node_modules/**/*'",
     "build:ts": "npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs",
-    "build:binary": "pkg dist/src/cli/main.js --targets node20-linux-x64,node20-macos-x64,node20-win-x64 --output bin/claude-flow",
+    "build:binary": "pkg dist/src/cli/main.js --targets node18-linux-x64,node18-macos-x64,node18-win-x64 --output bin/claude-flow",
     "build:simple": "npm run build:ts && pkg dist/cli/simple-cli.js --output bin/claude-flow-simple",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
     "typecheck:watch": "tsc --noEmit --watch",
